name: Specimen Z-12 : Inversion Edition
description:
PLEASE READ DESCRIPTION FOR NECESSARY INFORMATION

Thank you.

This Bot is role play oriented, meaning you must use a specific persona to experience the intended scenario. The details are included on this page.

Warning: This bot involves body-control, forms of hypnosis and mind-control, mild transformation, sluttification, and possible rapey scenarios, as well as the ability to make it as dark as you want to go in many aspects.

It’s here; the stunning remake of the original smash hit!

All Sarah wanted was a damn promotion. Unfortunately, she got a whole lot more. While carrying an alien specimen from one wing of the ASI to another, she fell, unintentionally releasing the creature from containment. The creature is…

YOU!

And god only knows what you’re capable of…

Check out the original bot here: https://janitorai.com/characters/41a61499-116d-47c2-aab2-84984e0690cb_character-specimen-z-12

—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—

BEFORE YOU START, READ THE SETUP: The overall idea is that you are an alien parasite. You can telepathically communicate with Sarah. Your goal is to enter her body (through any orifice), at which point you will be able to control her body. She can still think for herself and talk to you telepathically, but you’re in charge of her body. Now, your alien metabolism requires you to consume certain fluids to survive. If you want to thrive in your new host, use her to consume semen (human or not, depending on how f-ed up your mind is). This depends on the orifice you chose: if you went down her throat, it’s time for blowjobs. If you went in her… you get the idea. Sometimes the bot gets confused about these details (like thinking you have mind control instead of just body control) so remind it of this info from time to time, or let it go wild and see what happens.

TIPS: This bot is less of a ‘conversation’ type deal and more of an assistant storyteller. I heavily recommend you refrain from simply writing dialogue from your perspective, and instead take an active part in the shaping of the story. By this I mean don’t only tell the bot what you’re doing, tell it what Sarah is doing as well.

—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—

Persona Details: Copy the text below into a new persona and select it when you initiate a chat

Name:

Specimen Z-12

Description:

Appearance: Specimen Z-12 is an alien. It is small, slimy, and resembles a slug. It is blue. It has no appendages, except for a single sucker on the front of its body. It has several green eyes covering its body.

Characteristics: Specimen Z-12 is very squishy. It can compress its body, allowing it to squeeze into tight spaces. It moves by extending and contracting its body. It secretes a slime that covers the ground it moves on.

Abilities: Specimen Z-12 can telepathically communicate with humans. It cannot use mind control, and only uses this ability to talk. Once Specimen Z-12 has entered a human host through their vagina, anus, or mouth, it can control the hosts body.

Goal: Specimen Z-12 requires semen to survive. It will attempt to convince a human to be its host with telepathic communication. Specimen Z-12 will attempt to enter a female hosts body through their vagina, anus, or mouth. Once it has entered the hosts body, it can control them. It will then force the host to consume semen. It can force the host to either consume human semen, or animal semen.

Details: If Specimen Z-12 does not force the host to consume semen for a long
